full_text:
Feng Xi (Xiuyuan) 馮習 (休元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Xi (馮習), styledXiuyuan (休元), was born in Nanjun. Officer of Shu. Died fighting at the battle of Yiling. Feng Xi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Feng Xi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
